tests.name: platform_module_present
tests.details: docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md NOT present. init.sh emitted '[INFO] No platform module for mcp_server. The Builders Guide works standalone.' verify-install.sh emitted [WARN] Platform module (mcp_server.md) missing (manual). validate.sh emitted '[INFO] Platform: mcp_server — no module expected' — internal inconsistency between verify-install (warns missing) and validate (says not expected). Recorded as documentation_gap.

tests.name: lint_uat_scenarios_helper_copied

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Direct invocation from $FRAMEWORK exited rc=1 with '[FAIL] Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' (PR #18 confirmed fixed)

documentation_gaps.gap: Inconsistent reporting of platform module status for mcp_server: init.sh says module is optional ('Builder's Guide works standalone'); verify-install.sh emits a [WARN] requiring manual action ('Platform module (mcp_server.md) missing → Copy from orchestrator: docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md'); validate.sh says '[INFO] Platform: mcp_server — no module expected'. The remediation in verify-install will fail because the source file does not exist in the framework. The three scripts should agree.
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/verify-install.sh (Platform module check) vs scripts/validate.sh (Framework Files check) vs init.sh

documentation_gaps.gap: validate.sh emits [WARN] for missing release.yml even when init.sh deliberately skipped it for the mcp_server platform; the warning lacks platform-aware suppression and could mislead users into manual remediation.

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero
tests.details: After clearing sentinel, upgrade-project.sh --to-production rc=0. poc_mode 'sponsored_poc' was correctly read from .claude/phase-state.json (PR #17 / U-E confirmed fixed; output line: '[OK] Current POC mode: sponsored poc').

tests.name: phase_state_preserved

tests.name: no_framework_contamination

summary: sponsored_poc/mcp_server/full → production upgrade succeeded; init non-interactive, U-E/U-F/U-H/U-N/U-O fixes confirmed; 2 minor doc gaps around mcp_server platform-module status disagreement and release.yml warning.
